    C

    com.sirentide.api - package com.sirentide.api
     
    com.sirentide.cli - package com.sirentide.cli
     
    com.sirentide.emit - package com.sirentide.emit
     
    com.sirentide.ir - package com.sirentide.ir
     
    com.sirentide.layout - package com.sirentide.layout
     

    D

    Diagram - Record Class in com.sirentide.ir
    The immutable intermediate representation every diagram type projects into (docs/DESIGN.md §4 — the single shared IR mermaid never built).
    Diagram(Diagram.Kind, List) - Constructor for record class com.sirentide.ir.Diagram
    Defensive copy — the IR is immutable by construction (byte-identical bakes, §6).
    Diagram.Kind - Enum Class in com.sirentide.ir
     

    E

    emit(LaidOut) - Method in interface com.sirentide.emit.SvgEmitter
     
    empty() - Static method in record class com.sirentide.ir.Diagram
     
    EMPTY - Enum constant in enum class com.sirentide.ir.Diagram.Kind
     
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.sirentide.ir.Diagram
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.sirentide.layout.LaidOut
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

    H

    hashCode() - Method in record class com.sirentide.ir.Diagram
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class com.sirentide.layout.LaidOut
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    height() - Method in record class com.sirentide.layout.LaidOut
    Returns the value of the height record component.

    K

    kind() - Method in record class com.sirentide.ir.Diagram
    Returns the value of the kind record component.

    L

    labels() - Method in record class com.sirentide.ir.Diagram
    Returns the value of the labels record component.
    LaidOut - Record Class in com.sirentide.layout
    Pure layout output: coordinates only, never SVG (docs/DESIGN.md §4 — the layout/emit split).
    LaidOut(double, double) - Constructor for record class com.sirentide.layout.LaidOut
    Creates an instance of a LaidOut record class.
    layout(Diagram) - Method in interface com.sirentide.layout.LayoutEngine
     
    LayoutEngine - Interface in com.sirentide.layout
    Pure layout: IR → coordinates.

    M

    m0Default() - Static method in interface com.sirentide.emit.SvgEmitter
     
    m0Default() - Static method in interface com.sirentide.layout.LayoutEngine
    The M0 default: empty diagrams lay out to a zero canvas.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.sirentide.cli.Main
     
    Main - Class in com.sirentide.cli
    CLI entry: read a Sirentide DSL from stdin, write baked SVG to stdout (mirrors LatteX's CLI shape).

    O

    of(double, double) - Static method in record class com.sirentide.layout.LaidOut
     

    P

    PIE - Enum constant in enum class com.sirentide.ir.Diagram.Kind
     

    R

    render(String) - Static method in class com.sirentide.api.Sirentide
    Bake a Sirentide DSL source into a self-contained SVG string.

    S

    SEQUENCE - Enum constant in enum class com.sirentide.ir.Diagram.Kind
     
    Sirentide - Class in com.sirentide.api
    Public entry point.
    SvgEmitter - Interface in com.sirentide.emit
    Pure emit: laid-out coordinates → SVG string.

    T

    toString() - Method in record class com.sirentide.ir.Diagram
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.sirentide.layout.LaidOut
    Returns a string representation of this record class.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.sirentide.ir.Diagram.Kind
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class com.sirentide.ir.Diagram.Kind
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    width() - Method in record class com.sirentide.layout.LaidOut
